title: NISQ Algorithm Design Principles
description: Master the fundamental principles of designing quantum algorithms for Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum devices, including noise constraints, circuit depth optimization, error mitigation integration, and variational approaches.
learningObjectives: Understand the key constraints of NISQ devices including noise, limited qubits, and short coherence times
Apply circuit depth optimization techniques to minimize decoherence effects
Integrate error mitigation strategies into algorithm design from the ground up
Design variational quantum algorithms following NISQ-compatible principles
Evaluate trade-offs between circuit expressibility and noise resilience
